message:
feat(render): render cluster titles in SVG, canvas, and terminal renderers

Wire the new LayoutClusterBox.title field into all three render backends:
- SVG: render title as <text> element positioned at cluster top
- Canvas: draw title text at cluster top with appropriate styling
- Terminal: render title text above cluster bounds on canvas

Layout: add cluster title positioning calculations for consistent
placement across renderers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
